message:
fix(coordinator): allow file overlap penalty with agent reservations fallback

The guard on line 390 was too strict, requiring `existingReservations != nil`
which prevented the fallback to `agent.Reservations` from ever being used.
computeFileOverlapPenalty already handles nil map gracefully by falling back
to agent.Reservations, so the nil check in the guard was incorrect.

Added test to verify agent reservations are used when no external reservation
map is provided.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
